description_long: This object consists of a group of four glass bottles, each with a distinct shape and colored liquid inside. The bottles have rounded or angular bodies and are sealed with cork stoppers. The liquids inside are pastel shades of pink, green, and purple, giving each bottle a unique appearance. The glass is clear and smooth, allowing the contents to be easily seen. The cork stoppers are light brown and fit snugly into the necks of the bottles. There are no visible labels, branding, or damage on any of the bottles.
description: A set of four clear glass bottles with cork stoppers, each containing pastel-colored liquid in pink, green, or purple hues.
description_view_0: Four bottles are lined up, showing their varying shapes and colored liquids, with cork stoppers clearly visible.
description_view_1: The rounded bottle with pink liquid is most prominent, and the other bottles recede in size and visibility.
description_view_2: The bottles are viewed from above, highlighting the cork tops and the colored liquids inside each bottle.
description_view_3: The green liquid bottle is most prominent, with the other bottles arranged behind it, showing their shapes and corks.
